steps.title: Factor the target
steps.content:
The requested expression can be written as $4$ times the expression given in the equation.
$$
28+4x=4(7+x)
$$

steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content: Since $7+x=11$, substitute $11$ into the factored expression. $$ 4(7+x)=4(11)=44 $$ The answer is 44.
